creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port updated, thanks.  Next time, please don't forget about legacy 
drivers (your diff would break them unless they wouldn't already be 
broken) and pkg-plist.  Your distinfo diff is also imperfect (contains 
195.x checksums). 

Bear in mind that nVidia port(s) are quite complex and special care must 
be taken when updating them.  It's not just about bumping version(s) and 
running "make makesum".
